hibernate-mapping.query: select forecastDetail from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.ForecastDetail as forecastDetail inner join forecastDetail.Forecast as forecast where forecast.Status = :status and forecast.ActualTransactionCount >= :fromTxnCount and forecast.ActualTransactionCount <= :toTxnCount and forecast.RunDate >= :fromDate and forecast.RunDate <= :toDate and forecastDetail.JobAction = :jobAction
